headline: Chipotle: Consumer Weakness Is Temporary, The Growth Story Remains Intact
summary: Chipotle (CMG) outlook: bigger portions, health-driven growth, Chipotlanes & digital sales, plus a $42 price target (27% upside). Read the full analysis here.

headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks to Consider Right Now and 1 We Brush Off
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

headline: Chipotle and 5 More Restaurant Stocks That Look Appetizing
summary: It’s tough being in the dining-out business right now. Soaring food costs are keeping families at home. Still, there are companies that can grow.
